name: Search Dungeon Master
short_description: Search Dungeon Master is an exciting hidden object puzzle game set in a medieval dungeon setting. This game is a great way to relax after a hard day and get away from problems.
detailed_description:
Search Dungeon Master is an exciting hidden object puzzle game set in a medieval dungeon setting.
This game is a great way to relax after a hard day and get away from problems. Intuitive gameplay and a calm atmosphere does not bother the player and allows you to immediately immerse yourself in the process.
The theme music creates an atmosphere of mystery and mystery in the game.
Some items will be easier to find. And some items will have to work hard to find! There are a lot of details on the location, the scenery is filled with medieval-themed objects. The player must explore every part of the location to find the right thing.
